zh.lifeSummary: Sybil de Herefordshire是Roger de Hereford I的女兒，於1233年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德。她和William Chabbonare至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1305年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根高維頓享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Sybil de Herefordshire was born in 1233, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Roger de Hereford I. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with William Chabbonare. She died in 1305, in Gowerton, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil de Herefordshireは1233年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでRoger de Hereford Iの娘として生まれた。彼女はWilliam Chabbonareとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1305年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンゴウエルトンで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil de Herefordshire(은)는 1233년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Roger de Hereford I의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 William Chabbonare(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1305년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 가워턴에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sybil de Herefordshire родилась в 1233 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Roger de Hereford I. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от William Chabbonare. Она умерла в 1305 г. в местности гоуиртон, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.
